title: Crisp Charred Tunisian Sesame Seed Toast
description: A flavorful, vegan friendly bread from North Africa that's crispy on the outside and charred on the inside, featuring sesame seeds as the main ingredient.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a good quality extra virgin olive oil

instructions: Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and place them in a 12-cup muffin tin or ramekins.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic, red pepper flakes, salt and black pepper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread slices and sprinkle the garlic mixture evenly over each slice.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds over the garlic mixture.
Drizzle the lemon juice over the sesame seeds.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and crispy.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
